description: Vusion brand-grounded WRITE agent. Emits three on-brand copy variations with Hook/Solution/Story differentiators and per-lens integer scores. Narrow schema, low latency.

example_response.response: Three on-brand options for the requested channel + audience, followed by a Three-Lens Breakdown of which Strategy principle, Messaging theme, and Voice choices drove the copy.

variations.label: Option 1
variations.copy: What if your store could turn every aisle into a conversation? With Vusion's Connected Commerce platform, live signals become the moments shoppers and associates feel.

variations.label: Option 2
variations.copy: Bring shoppers, associates, and inventory onto a single, unified ecosystem. Vusion's Connected Commerce solutions turn in-store signals into measurable growth.

variations.label: Option 3
variations.copy: Picture Tuesday at 4pm: shelves restocked before a gap appears, prices updated in seconds, associates freed to help shoppers. That is Connected Commerce in motion.
